top_signals.title: Trump claims Xi will not arm Iran as strike threat looms
top_signals.summary: US president warns Tehran has ‘two or three days’ to reach a deal and reopen the Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: 30-year Treasury yield tops 5.19%, highest since before the financial crisis
top_signals.summary: Global bond markets remain on edge as traders monitor central bank responses to renewed inflation fears.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Extend Declines as Yields Climb, Tech Stocks Slide
top_signals.summary: US stocks extended declines on Tuesday, trading lower as US long-term yields touched their highest since 2007  amid heightened inflation concerns. The tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 Index was on track for a second day with losses of at least 1% in three sessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Chanel to open more stores in China as new designer stirs ‘Blazy mania’
top_signals.summary: French luxury group reports a return to sales and profit growth
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Global Millennial Capital Closes USD 100 Million IPO Opportunities Fund Focused on AI, Decentralized Financial Infrastructure, and Climate Technologies
top_signals.summary: Global Millennial Capital Ltd. (“GMCL”) today announced the final closing of its inaugural IPO Opportunities Fund at USD 100 million. Raised through a private placement with institutional and professional investors, the fund targets late-stage and special opportunities investments across mid-cap technology companies operating in high-growth sectors, including artificial intelligence, decentralized finance infrastructure, cybersecurity, digital infrastructure, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
